definition: Light that comes from the sun.
sentence_context: The sunlight streamed through the window.

definition: Expressed in writing.
sentence_context: The instructions were written on the board.

definition: A yellow spread made from milk.
sentence_context: I put butter on my popcorn.

definition: A small animal with long ears.
sentence_context: The rabbit ate a carrot.

definition: A set of steps for climbing.
sentence_context: He used a ladder to reach the roof.

definition: A tool used for hitting nails.
sentence_context: I used a hammer to fix the chair.

definition: The main meal of the day.
sentence_context: We are having pizza for dinner.

definition: A young cat.
sentence_context: The kitten is very playful.

definition: The warmest season of the year.
sentence_context: I like to go swimming in the summer.

definition: The coldest season of the year.
sentence_context: It snows a lot in the winter.

definition: Feeling or showing pleasure.
sentence_context: I am so happy to see you!

definition: The color of a lemon.
sentence_context: The duckling was bright yellow.

definition: A glass or plastic container.
sentence_context: Can I have a bottle of water?

definition: A small disc used to fasten clothes.
sentence_context: I lost a button on my shirt.

definition: A period of learning.
sentence_context: We had a music lesson today.

definition: The center point.
sentence_context: He stood in the middle of the room.

definition: A small pool of water.
sentence_context: Do not step in the puddle!

definition: Happening without warning.
sentence_context: There was a sudden loud noise.

definition: A sport played with rackets.
sentence_context: We played tennis after school.

definition: An opening in a wall for light.
sentence_context: Open the window to let in some air.

definition: An area behind a house.
sentence_context: We played tag in the backyard.

definition: A small cake for one person.
sentence_context: She baked a vanilla cupcake.

definition: An insect that glows at night.
sentence_context: The firefly blinked in the dark.

definition: A small orange fish.
sentence_context: I fed my goldfish this morning.

definition: A small bag for carrying things.
sentence_context: She kept her keys in her handbag.

definition: A book for writing notes.
sentence_context: I wrote the list in my notebook.

definition: A thin, flat cake.
sentence_context: I like syrup on my pancake.

definition: Colors in the sky after rain.
sentence_context: Look at the beautiful rainbow!

definition: A figure made of snow.
sentence_context: We built a snowman in the yard.

definition: A brush for cleaning teeth.
sentence_context: Do not forget your toothbrush.

definition: The upper floor of a building.
sentence_context: My bedroom is located upstairs.

definition: Water falling from a height.
sentence_context: The waterfall was very loud.

definition: A game played with a ball and hoop.
sentence_context: He threw the basketball into the net.

definition: All things.
sentence_context: I packed everything I needed.

definition: A game played with an oval ball.
sentence_context: They played football on Sunday.

definition: Work done at home for school.
sentence_context: I finished my homework early.

definition: Not inside a building.
sentence_context: Let us go outside and play.

definition: An area for children to play.
sentence_context: Meet me at the playground.

definition: A sea animal shaped like a star.
sentence_context: We found a starfish on the beach.

definition: A tall plant with a yellow flower.
sentence_context: The sunflower follows the sun.
